aiIntegrations.title: AI Integrations
aiIntegrations.description: Connect AI assistants like Claude or ChatGPT to analyze your financial data directly from chat.

mcpServer.title: MCP Server
mcpServer.description: Use this URL to connect AI assistants to your MoneyMatter account. Your data is shared read-only.
mcpServer.copiedNotification: MCP server URL copied to clipboard

quickConnect.title: Quick Connect
quickConnect.description: Choose an AI assistant below. Click the button to open its settings, then follow the steps.

steps.createConnector: Click the {icon} icon next to "Connectors" to create a new connector
steps.finish: Leave Advanced settings empty and click {action}
steps.authorize: You will be redirected to MoneyMatter to authorize access
You will be redirected to MoneyMatter to authorize access

connectedApps.title: Connected Apps
connectedApps.description: Apps that have access to your financial data. You can revoke access at any time.
connectedApps.emptyDescription: Use the buttons above to connect an AI assistant.

revokeDialog.title: Revoke access?
revokeDialog.description: This will immediately disconnect the app and invalidate all its tokens. You can reconnect later.
